title: Jio Platforms Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Jio Platforms Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Jio Platforms Ventures Solutions, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Vadodara operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Jio Platforms Ventures Solutions:
Jio Platforms Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jio Platforms Ventures Solutions!
